queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the correlation between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: Investigating the risk mitigation effects of negative checking account balances on borrower creditworthiness.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: Empirical evidence linking the lack of a formal savings account to lower default rates among retail borrowers.
